subject: Phase B: Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Gates
description:
Implement approval workflows for high-risk actions:
- titan/safety/hitl.py (HITL approval handler)
- titan/safety/gates.py (Approval gate definitions)
- titan/safety/policies.py (Action risk classification)
- dashboard/components/approval.py (Approval UI component)
- Modify tools/executor.py to check approval gates
- Modify dashboard/app.py for WebSocket approval endpoints
